matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-userprofile-001 title: create user profile module: userprofile source pages: 2, 3 preconditions: no existing user profile. test data: a new user with all required fields filled. test steps: 1. main initiates getdatafromuser. 2. local user provides user data. 3. main checks the data. 4. main requests data from the data manager. 5. data manager returns success to main. 6. main signals success to the local user. expected result: user profile is created successfully.
